name: ASRock B860M-H2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8333+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - 2x HDMI 2.1 - Realtek Gigabit LAN - 3x USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A
shortName: ASRock B860M-H2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 4.0
description: ASRock B860M-H2 Micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 4.0 and DDR5 support for budget-conscious Intel LGA 1851 builds.
